title: Noodlemancy
description: Builds upon the existing Minecraft magic systems with new redstone components, blocks, items, enchantments, and potions.
body:
In the future, this mod will expand upon Minecraft's magic systems, including adding new potions, enchantments, and redstone components. Currently, Noodlemancy features:
- Sneezer: When activated, it charges for a second before ejecting a stack of items like a superpowered dropper. While charging, it pulls in nearby items into itself.
- Creaking Eye: When seen, it gives off a redstone signal. The closer the cursor is to the eye, the stronger the signal strength.
